GET /accounts/{account_id}/data-security.description: List all export jobs for a given requestor's organization

parameters.description: Cloudflare account ID for the user making the request.
parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.
parameters.name: per_page

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

count.description: Total number of results for the requested service.

next.description: URL to the next page of results.

page.description: Current page within paginated list of results.

per_page.description: Number of results per page of results.

previous.description: URL to the previous page of results.

total_count.description: Total results available without any search parameters.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

download_url.description: The URL by which the successfully created export can be downloaded by the end users.

errors.description: Contains information on errors which may have occurred during export creation.

file_name.description: The base name of the file that is/was generated by the export job.

file_path.description: The full path of the file that is stored within external storage (currently R2).

id.description: Unique identifier for the export job.

parameters.description: Cloudflare account ID for the user making the request.
parameters.name: account_id

schema.description: Request body for creating content exports.

dlp_profile_information.description: DLP profile metadata for the export.

entries.description: Entries contained within this DLP profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DLP profile entry.

name.description: Name of the DLP profile entry.

profile_id.description: ID of the parent DLP profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DLP profile.

max_affliction_date.description: Filter to view content flagged on or before this date.

min_affliction_date.description: Filter to view content flagged on or after this date.

JSON pointer to the source of the error.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

errors.description: Contains information on errors which may have occurred during export creation.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/data-securit.description:
Creates a CSV export for Finding instances and accepts optional filters in the payload.

The `storage_namespace_id` path parameter is derived from the finding ID by base64-decoding it
(which yields `integration_id:finding_type_id`) and replacing the colon with a hyphen.

parameters.description: Cloudflare account ID for the user making the request.
parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description:
A storage namespace identifier for the finding, used to scope finding instance exports.
Constructed by base64-decoding the finding ID (which encodes `integration_id:finding_type_id`)
and replacing the colon separator with a hyphen.
For example, a finding ID that decodes to `00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001:00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002`
becomes `00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001-00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002`.
parameters.name: storage_namespace_id

schema.description: Filter specification for finding instance exports.

max_affliction_date.description: Filter to view findings that occurred on or before the affliction date. Can be a date-time in ISO 8601 format or an epoch timestamp.

min_affliction_date.description: Filter to view findings that occurred on or after the affliction date. Can be a date-time in ISO 8601 format or an epoch timestamp.

items.description: Order specification for finding instance exports.

name.description: Which field to use when ordering the finding instances.

allOf.description: Common response structure for all API endpoints.

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

download_url.description: The URL by which the successfully created export can be downloaded by the end users.

errors.description: Contains information on errors which may have occurred during export creation.

file_name.description: The base name of the file that is/was generated by the export job.

file_path.description: The full path of the file that is stored within external storage (currently R2).

id.description: Unique identifier for the export job.

parameters.description: Cloudflare account ID for the user making the request.
parameters.name: account_id

schema.description: Filter specification for findings export jobs.

min_affliction_date.description: Filter to view findings that occurred on or after the affliction date. Can be a date-time in ISO 8601 format or an epoch timestamp.

orders.description: Which fields to use when ordering the findings.

name.description: Which field to use when ordering the findings.

items.description: The severity level for export filters.

name.description: Which field to use when ordering the remediation jobs.
